document.title: ZPMV2.E309283 - Wiring, Printed - Component
document.documentType: UL Online Certifications Directory listing card

sourceSummary.oneLine: UL listing card ZPMV2.E309283 for J Y CIRCUIT CO LTD printed wiring components.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports verification of UL recognized printed wiring board component listing conditions, markings, and construction types for file E309283.
keyPoints: The listing identifies J Y CIRCUIT CO LTD under file number E309283 for Wiring, Printed - Component.
The listed constructions include multilayer, multilayer rigid-flex flexible materials interconnect, single layer flexible, single layer metal base, and single layer printed wiring boards.
The table includes operating temperatures, solder limits, flame class, and whether constructions meet UL796.
The marking statement requires company name or trademark, or file number and type designation, and the Recognized Component Mark.
The page states that only products bearing the UL Mark should be considered certified and covered under UL Follow-Up Service.
